title: FabFinds Christmas Ceramic Mug 370ml Cute Holiday Coffee & Tea Cup Glossy Glazed Festive Drinkware for Cocoa, Hot Drinks, or Gifting Assorted Designs (Merry Christmas Red)
features: FESTIVE HOLIDAY DESIGNS – Choose from colourful prints including a penguin, winter bear, or bright “Merry Christmas” text
350ML CAPACITY – Ideal for your morning brew, holiday cocoa, or seasonal tea time
PERFECT FOR GIFTING – Great stocking stuffer, Secret Santa or teacher gift
GLOSSY FINISH – Durable ceramic mug with smooth glaze and comfortable handle
4 ASSORTED VARIANTS – Collect them all or gift a set to spread holiday cheer
description: Enjoy your favourite holiday drink with a touch of festive flair! This 370ml Christmas Ceramic Mug collection features colourful, feel-good artwork ranging from cute characters like a penguin and bear to bold “Merry Christmas” lettering in two stylish colourways. Each mug is crafted from glazed ceramic with a flared rim and smooth handle for easy sipping. Whether you’re enjoying your own seasonal moment or gifting to a loved one, these mugs bring Christmas joy to every cup.
